ddls:
CREATE TABLE "operations" (
  "op_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the operation */,
  "hlo_op" TEXT /* High-level operation description */,
  "tf_op" TEXT /* TensorFlow operation description */,
  "occurrences" INTEGER /* Number of times the operation occurred */,
  "total_time_us" REAL /* Total execution time of the operation in microseconds */,
  "avg_time_us" REAL /* Average execution time of the operation in microseconds */,
  "total_self_time_us" REAL /* Total self-time of the operation in microseconds */,
  "avg_self_time_us" REAL /* Average self-time of the operation in microseconds */,
  "total_self_time_percent" REAL /* Percentage of total self-time */,
  "cumulative_self_time_percent" REAL /* Cumulative percentage of total self-time */,
  "time_stalled_dma_percent" INTEGER /* Percentage of time stalled by DMA */,
  "measured_gflops" REAL /* Measured GFLOP/s */,
  "measured_memory_bw_gib" REAL /* Measured memory bandwidth in GiB/s */,
  "operational_intensity" REAL /* Operational intensity (FLOP/Byte) */,
  "bound_by" TEXT /* Performance bound by */,
  "hlo_rematerialization" TEXT /* HLO rematerialization status */,
  "outside_compilation" TEXT /* Outside compilation status */,
  "operation_start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the operation started */,
  "operation_end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the operation ended */,
  "error_code" INTEGER /* Any error code associated with the operation */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Description of the error if any */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the operation */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the operation */,
  "hardware_id" TEXT /* ID of the hardware used for the operation */,
  "software_version" TEXT /* Version of the software used for the operation */,
  "execution_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the operation was executed (e.g., cloud, on-premises) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("op_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operations_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operations_outside_compilation FOREIGN KEY ("outside_compilation") REFERENCES outside_compilation ("compilation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operations_bound_by FOREIGN KEY ("bound_by") REFERENCES bound_by ("bound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operations_hlo_rematerialization FOREIGN KEY ("hlo_rematerialization") REFERENCES hlo_rematerialization ("remat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the operation category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the category */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the category was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the category */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "op_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operation */,
  "occurrences" INTEGER /* Number of times the operation occurred */,
  "total_time_us" REAL /* Total execution time of the operation in microseconds */,
  "avg_time_us" REAL /* Average execution time of the operation in microseconds */,
  "total_self_time_us" REAL /* Total self-time of the operation in microseconds */,
  "avg_self_time_us" REAL /* Average self-time of the operation in microseconds */,
  "total_self_time_percent" REAL /* Percentage of total self-time */,
  "cumulative_self_time_percent" REAL /* Cumulative percentage of total self-time */,
  "time_stalled_dma_percent" INTEGER /* Percentage of time stalled by DMA */,
  "measured_gflops" REAL /* Measured GFLOP/s */,
  "measured_memory_bw_gib" REAL /* Measured memory bandwidth in GiB/s */,
  "operational_intensity" REAL /* Operational intensity (FLOP/Byte) */,
  "max_time_us" REAL /* Maximum execution time of the operation in microseconds */,
  "min_time_us" REAL /* Minimum execution time of the operation in microseconds */,
  "standard_deviation_time_us" REAL /* Standard deviation of the execution time */,
  "hardware_id" TEXT /* ID of the hardware used for the operation */,
  "software_version" TEXT /* Version of the software used for the operation */,
  "execution_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the operation was executed (e.g., cloud, on-premises) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_op_id FOREIGN KEY ("op_id") REFERENCES operations ("op_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bound_by" (
  "bound_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance bottleneck */,
  "bound_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance bottleneck */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the performance bottleneck */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the bottleneck */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the bottleneck was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the bottleneck */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the bottleneck was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hlo_rematerialization" (
  "remat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HLO rematerialization status */,
  "remat_status" TEXT /* Status of HLO rematerialization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the HLO rematerialization status */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the status */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the status */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("remat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outside_compilation" (
  "compilation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outside compilation status */,
  "compilation_status" TEXT /* Status of outside compilation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the outside compilation status */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the status */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the status */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compilation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  "data_size_mb" REAL /* Size of the dataset in megabytes */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON, Parquet) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the dataset */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was uploaded */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the dataset */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the dataset */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
